policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM user_roles
  WHERE ((user_roles.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (user_roles.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.policyname: Admin can view all access requests
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM user_roles
  WHERE ((user_roles.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (user_roles.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.policyname: Users can create their own requests
Users can view their own requests

policies.qual:
((organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()) OR (hospital_id IN ( SELECT hospitals.id
   FROM hospitals
  WHERE (hospitals.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())
policies.with_check:
((organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()) OR (hospital_id IN ( SELECT hospitals.id
   FROM hospitals
  WHERE (hospitals.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())

policies.qual:
((doctor_id IN ( SELECT d.id
   FROM (doctors d
     JOIN hospitals h ON ((d.hospital_id = h.id)))
  WHERE (h.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())

((hospital_id IN ( SELECT hospitals.id
   FROM hospitals
  WHERE (hospitals.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())

policies.policyname: Anyone can view invites by token

policies.qual:
((claimed = false) AND (email = (( SELECT users.email
   FROM auth.users
  WHERE (users.id = auth.uid())))::text))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM user_roles
  WHERE ((user_roles.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (user_roles.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM user_roles
  WHERE ((user_roles.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (user_roles.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM user_roles
  WHERE ((user_roles.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (user_roles.role = 'admin'::text))))

((doctor_id IN ( SELECT d.id
   FROM (doctors d
     JOIN hospitals h ON ((d.hospital_id = h.id)))
  WHERE (h.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())

((emergency_request_id IN ( SELECT emergency_requests.id
   FROM emergency_requests
  WHERE (emergency_requests.user_id = auth.uid()))) OR p_is_admin())

policies.policyname: Org Admins see their hospital emergencies
policies.qual:
(hospital_id IN ( SELECT hospitals.id
   FROM hospitals
  WHERE (hospitals.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id())))

policies.policyname: Users can update own emergency requests

policies.qual:
(hospital_id IN ( SELECT hospitals.id
   FROM hospitals
  WHERE (hospitals.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id())))

policies.policyname: Org Admins see own org wallet
Profiles are readable by owner or admin

policies.qual:
((hospital_id IN ( SELECT hospitals.id
   FROM hospitals
  WHERE (hospitals.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())

((hospital_id IN ( SELECT hospitals.id
   FROM hospitals
  WHERE (hospitals.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())

policies.policyname: Org Admins see own org ledger
policies.qual:
((wallet_id IN ( SELECT ow.id
   FROM organization_wallets ow
  WHERE (ow.organization_id = p_get_current_org_id()))) OR p_is_admin())

((wallet_id IN ( SELECT pw.id
   FROM patient_wallets pw
  WHERE (pw.user_id = auth.uid()))) OR p_is_admin())
